search_summary.search_focus: Wholesale spectacle lens businesses, optical wholesalers, spectacle frame dealers

shops.name: Sheeba Opticals
shops.address: North Car Street, Sankarankoil Tirunelveli Road, Sankarankovil - 627756
shops.phone: Available on Justdial (not extracted due to JS rendering)
shops.notes: Highest rated optical shop in Sankarankovil. Rated 4.9/5 based on 331 reviews with 77 photos. Listed as Optician, Sunglass Dealer, Spectacle Dealer, Optical Frame Dealer, Contact Lens Expert. Operating hours: Mon-Sun 9:00 AM - 10:00 PM. Stocks spectacle frames, lenses, sunglasses. Appears on multiple Justdial category pages including Optical Frame Dealers and Sunglass Dealers in Sankarankovil.

shops.name: Meera Opticals (Est. 1988)
shops.notes: Long-established optical store since 1988 (40+ years). Family's trusted optical store. Authorized ZEISS ClearView lenses dealer. Offers advanced eye testing and stylish frame collections. Also listed as 'New Meera Opticals' on Sankarankoil Tirunelveli Road (rated 4.5/5, 4 reviews, hours 8 AM - 10 PM daily). Has significant social media presence. Tagline: 'Clear Vision. Local Trust.'

shops.name: Smart Opticals
shops.notes: Listed as Optical Frame Dealer AND Optical Glass Dealer in Sankarankovil. Multiple phone numbers suggest business operation scale. Appears consistently as the top-listed dealer on Useityellowpages across multiple optical categories (Optical Shop, Optical Frame Dealers, Optical Glass Dealer). Likely the primary wholesale/B2B spectacle frame and lens dealer in Sankarankovil area.
shops.type: Wholesale Optical Frame Dealer / Lens Dealer

shops.name: Sakthi Opticals
shops.address: Main Road / North Car Street East Corner, Opposite Vijaya Bakery, Keelaveethi, Sankarankovil - 627756
shops.notes: Rated 5.0/5 based on 45 reviews with 98 photos. Advertised as 'quality eye glasses at Madurai prices' in Sankarankovil. Computer-based eye testing available. Trained optometrist on staff. Also serves as a bus boarding point (Eagle Transport), indicating prominent main road location.

shops.name: Shifa Opticals
shops.address: 36 North Car Street, Sankarankovil - 627756 (also: 302, Vadakku Radha Veethi, Sankarankoil)
shops.notes: Authorized Kodak lens dealer. Listed on multiple directories including a2v.in, callezee.com, and tenkasicityguide.com. Two phone numbers suggest established business.

shops.name: Vision Care Opticals (Vision Care Optics / Vision Care Clinic)
shops.address: 249, Rajapalayam Road, Opposite to IOB Bank, Sankarankoil - 627756
shops.notes: Run by M. Vel Murugan, Optometrist. Rated 5.0/5 based on 2 reviews. Listed under Opticians, Vision Care, and Optical categories. Vision Care Clinic attached. Full optometry practice with optical dispensing.

shops.name: Chennai Opticals
shops.address: Near Anand Pharma, Railway Feeder Road, Sankarankoil Tirunelveli Road, Sankarankovil
shops.notes: Justdial Verified listing. Rated 5.0/5 based on 1 review. Operating hours: Mon-Sun 9:00 AM onwards. Also listed under Spectacle Dealers for Kadayanallur area, suggesting they serve a broader market beyond Sankarankovil.

shops.name: Optical Palace - II (Opticals Palace)
shops.address: North Car Street, Sankarankoil Tirunelveli Road, Sankarankovil - 627756
shops.notes: Listed specifically under 'Optical Frame Dealers' category in Sankarankovil. Located on the main commercial street (North Car Street). Focuses on spectacle frame sales.

shops.name: SUMAAN Eye Care and Opticals
shops.address: 1/98E, Sankarankovil Tk Main Road, Virasigamani, Tirunelveli - 627862
shops.notes: Registered proprietorship firm since 06-Nov-2020 (5+ years old). Located in Virasigamani on the Sankarankovil-Tenkasi Main Road. Serves the Sankarankovil taluk market. Listed on Justdial across multiple nearby town searches (Surandai, Kadayanallur, Alangulam, Kavalakurichi pages).

shops.name: Velan Eye Care and Opticals
shops.address: Main Road, Sankarankoil Main Road, Virasigamani, Tirunelveli - 627862
shops.notes: Eye care clinic with optical dispensing on the Sankarankovil Main Road in Virasigamani area. Listed on a2v.in directory.

shops.name: Vasu Opticals
shops.address: Kella Bazar Road, Vasudevanallur, Tenkasi District
shops.notes: Justdial listed optician in Vasudevanallur (~25 km from Sankarankovil). Fits spectacle frames, contact lenses, and fashion eyewear. Operating hours: Mon-Sun 10:00 AM - 9:00 PM. Also listed on calltenkasi.com.

shops.name: Jannath Opticals
shops.address: Main Road, Near Sathya Clinic, Puliyangudi, Tirunelveli District
shops.notes: Justdial listed optician and contact lens dealer in Puliyangudi (~40 km from Sankarankovil). Near Sathya Clinic on Main Road.

shops.name: Eagle Vision Opticals
shops.address: Near Samsung Showroom, Surandai, Tirunelveli District
shops.notes: Highest rated optical shop in Surandai area. Rated 5.0/5 based on 89 reviews. Open until 9:30 PM. Surandai is ~20 km from Sankarankovil.

shops.name: NOAH Vision Care & Dental Care
shops.address: 32A, SJN Complex, STC College Road, Near Kartheek Nursing Home, Perumalpuram, Tirunelveli - 627007
shops.notes: Major vision care provider in Tirunelveli town (~70 km from Sankarankovil). Rated 4.9/5 based on 245 reviews. Handles spectacle lenses, contact lens dispensing, and eye exams. Listed on Lybrate, Justdial. Serves as a regional wholesale/retail hub. Also appears on Sankarankovil Justdial searches as nearby option for spectacle frame dealers and contact lens dealers.
shops.type: Vision Care / Optical Dispensing / Regional Hub

shops.name: Sri Balaji Opticals
shops.address: South Bazaar, Near Mutharamman Kovil, Palayamkottai, Tirunelveli - 627002
shops.notes: Major optical shop in Palayamkottai (~80 km from Sankarankovil). Rated 4.8/5. Listed as Contact Lens Dealer (Cooper Vision, Ray Ban categories). Handles optical lens sales, contact lens solutions, and computer optical lenses. Palayamkottai is the district's main commercial center and wholesale hub.
shops.type: Major Retail Optical / Contact Lens Dealer (District Hub)

shops.name: Zenith Opticals
shops.address: 93, Opposite L.I.C Bus Stop, Trivandrum Road, Palayamkottai, Tirunelveli - 627002
shops.notes: Established optical showroom in Palayamkottai. Has own website. Operating hours: Monday-Saturday 10 AM - 8 PM. Palayamkottai serves as the main optical wholesale center for the entire Tirunelveli district including Sankarankovil.

key_observations.wholesale_focus: Sankarankovil does not appear to have dedicated B2B wholesale optical distributors. The market is primarily served by retail optical shops that may also supply to smaller retailers on request. Smart Opticals (Perunkottur) appears most likely to serve wholesale/B2B needs based on its listing across multiple dealer categories.

Essilor/Crizal/Varilux: Likely available through multiple shops; specific dealer confirmation requires direct contact

key_observations.primary_commercial_area: North Car Street and Sankarankoil Tirunelveli Road form the main optical business corridor in Sankarankovil
regional_wholesale_hubs: Palayamkottai (~80 km) - Sri Balaji Opticals, Zenith Opticals - main district wholesale center
Tirunelveli Town (~70 km) - NOAH Vision Care - regional vision care hub
Tirunelveli also has Essilor Experts Store at KP Road, Charummoodu (phone: 80789 86650) which offers wholesale & retail
data_limitations: Justdial listings require JavaScript rendering for exact phone numbers - actual phone numbers available on their respective Justdial pages
No pure wholesale spectacle lens distributors found specifically in Sankarankovil town
Most shops are retail-focused opticians that may also handle B2B orders
